metaData.SAP Product Name: ANESSA PERFECT UV SUNSCREEN SKINCARE MILK 20ML

value.name: Anessa Perfect UV Sunscreen Skincare Milk

offers.description: Buy 1 Anessa Perfect UV Sunscreen Skincare Milk @ $12.90

parentCategory.name: Beauty & Personal Care
parentCategory.tagLine: Bath & body, hair care, facial wash & more

product.description:
• Auto Veil Technology - Automatically repairs and smooths UV protection veil that can crease or get patchy with facial movements. Provides moisture to care for damage caused by dryness while supporting skin’s moisture-retaining power.
• Auto Booster Technology - Uniform and stronger UV protective veil when in contact with Sweat, Water and Humidity - Perfect for tropical climate!
• Aqua Booster EX Technology - Stronger UV Protection when in contact with sweat or water (proven after 80 minutes in pool)
• Friction and Sand Resistant - Sunscreen stays on skin even with friction and rubbing
• 50% Beauty Skincare Ingredients - Prevents photoaging, contains beauty ingredients that prevents vasodilation and skin oxidation caused by UV rays
• Colorant-free, non-comedogenic & dermatologist-tested
• Washes off easily with soap or daily cleanser

metaData.Ingredients: Water (Aqua), Alcohol, Dimethicone, Diisopropyl Sebacate, Octocrylene, Ethylhexyl Salicylate, Homosalate, Titanium Dioxide, C12-15 Alkyl Benzoate, Glycerin, Bis-Ethylhexyloxyphenol Methoxyphenyl Triazine, Diethylamino Hydroxybenzoyl Hexyl Benzoate, Caprylyl Methicone, Peg-60 Hydrogenated Castor Oil, Butylene Glycol, Ethylhexyl Triazone, Trimethylsiloxysilicate, Xanthan Gum, Peg/ppg-14/7 Dimethyl Ether, Peg/ppg-9/2 Dimethyl Ether, Dipotassium Glycyrrhizate, Camellia Sinensis Leaf Extract, Potentilla Erecta Root Extract, Citrus Unshiu Peel Extract, Sodium Acetylated Hyaluronate, Soluble Collagen, Acrylamides/dmapa Acrylates/methoxy Peg Methacrylate Copolymer, Hydrogenated Palm Oil, Isododecane, Hydrated Silica, Bis-Butyldimethicone Polyglyceryl-3, Polyglyceryl-6 Polyricinoleate, Elaeis Guineensis (Palm) Kernel Oil, Triethoxycaprylylsilane, Elaeis Guineensis (Palm) Oil, Carbomer, Potassium Hydroxide, Dextrin Palmitate/Ethylhexanoate, Agar, Acrylates/c10-30 Alkyl Acrylate Crosspolymer, Tocopherol, BHT, Hydroxypropyl Methylcellulose Stearoxy Ether, Distearyldimonium Chloride, Stearic Acid, Dextrin Palmitate, Peg-6, Sodium Metabisulfite, Silica, Synthetic Fluorphlogopite, Citric Acid, Phenoxyethanol, Fragrance (Parfum)
metaData.Key Information: Improves the appearance of dark spots for a beautiful complexion. Moisturizes and regulates the water retention capacity of bare skin. For face & body, for all skin types, dewy fresh gel texture.

metaData.Ingredients: Aqua/Water, Octocrylene, Alcohol Denat., Butyl Methoxydibenzoylmethane, Isopropyl Palmitate, Silica, Ethylhexyl Triazone, Bis-Ethylhexyloxyphenol Methoxyphenyl Triazine, Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Glycerin, Tocopherol, Niacinamide, Dimethicone, Mica, Acrylates/C10-30 Alkyl Acrylate Crosspolymer, Triethanolamine, Xanthan Gum, Disodium Edta, Sodium Hyaluronate, Dimethylmethoxy Chromanol, Hydroxyethylcellulose, Sodium Hydroxide, Citric Acid, Potassium Sorbate, Caprylyl Glycol, Glyceryl Stearate, Parfum/Fragrance.
metaData.Key Information: Super UV Cooling Gel Sunscreen instantly cools your skin while delivering broad-spectrum protection from UVA and UVB rays. With a fresh watery gel texture, it hydrates and refreshes your skin without leaving a white cast. Designed for all skin tones, this sunscreen provides long-lasting freshness for up to 8 hours while shielding your skin from harmful sun exposure.

metaData.Ingredients: Aqua/Water, Alcohol Denat., Diisopropyl Sebacate, Silica, Isopropyl Myristate, Ethylhexyl Salicylate, Ethylhexyl Triazone, Bis-Ethylhexyloxyphenol Methoxyphenyl Triazine, Butyl Methoxydibenzoylmethane, C12-22 Alkyl Acrylate/Hydroxyethylacrylate Copolymer, Glycerin, Propanediol, Niacinamide, Drometrizole Trisiloxane, Perlite, Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Tocopherol, Hydroxyethylcellulose, Sodium Benzoate, Sodium Phosphate, Triethanolamine, Trisodium Ethylenediamine Disuccinate, Silica Silylate, Salicylic Acid, Polysorbate 80, Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Juice, Caprylyl Glycol, Tetrapeptide-30, Acetyl Glycyl Beta-Alanine, Acrylates/C10-30 Alkyl Acrylate Crosspolymer, Sarcosine, Citrus Limon Fruit Extract/Lemon Fruit Extract, Citral, Citric Acid, Potassium Sorbate, Parfum/Fragrance.
metaData.Key Information: Garnier Super UV Anti-Acne Serum formulated to provide daily sun protection for acne-prone skin. Offering 12 hours of oil control and protection from harmful UV rays, it helps prevent acne and reduces sun damage. The water-resistant, non-comodogenic formula ensures no clogging of pores and is makeup-compatible for everyday use.

metaData.Ingredients: Water, Water, Ethylhexyl Methoxycinnamate, Silica, Phenoxyethanol, PVP, Chlorphenesin, Disodium EDTA, BHT, Propylene Glycol Dicaprylate, Dicaprate, Ethylhexyl Methoxycinnamate, Alcohol, Dimethicone, Pentylene Glycol, PEG-12 Dimethicone, Polysilicone-15, Butylene Glycol, Bis-Ethylhexyloxyphenol Methoxyphenyl Triazine, Diethylamino Hydroxybenzoyl Hexyl Benzoate, Ethylhexyl Triazone, Dimethicone, Polysilicone-13, Phenoxyethanol, Carbomer, Triethanolamine, Methylparaben, Bisabolol, Cocos Nucifera (Coconut) Oil, Gardenia Florida Flower Extract, "Hexyl Cinnamal, Hydroxyisohexyl 3-Cyclohexene Carboxaldehyde, Benzyl Salicylate, Linalool, Butylphenyl Methylpropional, Benzyl Benzoate, Tocopherol, Helianthus Annuus (Sunflower) Seed Oil, Hydroxyethylcellulose, Disodium EDTA, Propylparaben, Magnesium Ascorbyl Phosphate, Hyaluronic Acid, Sodium Hyaluronate
metaData.Key Information:
The formula contains high ingredient concentration equivalent to 4 skincare products with no compromise to results:
• Hada Labo Proprietary Hyaluronic Acids: Lock, store and replenish long-lasting moisture for smooth bouncy skin, and is a natural component found in our skin that can store water up to 6 to 20X its weight
• Purest Vitamin C: Helps to increase collagen production, repair fine lines and rejuvenates skin for healthy glowing radiance
• Superb UV filters: Provides long-lasting and sun-stable protection and unique property allows absorption of active ingredients while staying lightly on skin's surface without clogging pores
metaData.Preparation:
• Directions:
1. To be used as a moisturiser for morning
2. Massage gently on face immediately after application of lotion

product.description:
• Non-Comedogenic, Oil-Free And Fragrance-Free.
• Developed With Dermatologists.
• Accepted By The National Eczema Association.

metaData.Key Information:
• Rich, non greasy, fast absorbing moisturizer for normal to dry skin on the face and body
• Formulated with three essential ceramides, it works to lock in skin's moisture and help maintain your skin’s protective barrier.
• 48-hour hydration supporting your protective skin barrier, long after you’ve finished applying.
metaData.Preparation:
• Directions:
•1. Apply liberally as often as Nneded, or as directed by a physician.
• Caution:
•1. For external use only.
